title: Tech & Sun Round by Greenpill Nigeria
dek: Greenpill Nigeria's Localism Fund thread gives the website a current source for solar-powered public goods infrastructure and builder education.
excerpt: A source-backed field report for Tech & Sun: solar, internet, campus infrastructure, and hands-on builder education in Nigeria.
body:
The Tech & Sun Round thread is the strongest new Greenpill Nigeria update from the live Hub pass.

The public source frames the work as solar-powered public goods infrastructure for Nigerian universities. Follow-up posts document the build moving through site setting, foundation work, container fabrication, solar and smart-meter installation, furniture, internet readiness, and staking infrastructure preparation.

This should read as a current field report and chapter initiative, not as a completed impact-metrics claim. Use the Hub thread as the public source until steward review adds final activation, usage, or learner counts.

## Sources

- S049: https://hub.regencoordination.xyz/t/tech-sun-round-by-greenpill-nigeria/393
author: Greenpill Network research
